title: ai-badger project config
description: Project profile authored by the agent during welcome-ai-badger and validated by scripts. The single machine-readable input the scaffolded skills read.

frameworkVersion.description: ai-badger framework version this config was generated against.

domain.description: One-line business/domain description; NOT a stack.

stacks.description: Selected technology stacks. Must exist under index.json.stacks (excluding 'common').

agents.description: Coding agents detected as present in the repo/user scope; only these are initialized. Keep in sync with AGENT_NAMES in badger_lib.py.

projectUrl.description: Board/project URL; gates project-board task features.

skillScope.description: default = honor each skill entry's declared scope; local = force all installs to project scope. Renamed from pluginScope in v0.7.0.

mcpToolIndex.description: MCP tool index configuration. When enabled, the mcp-index skill and ai_badger_hooks plugin use index-based tool recommendations.

path.description: Relative path to the index file within the project.
